title: [FIRRTL] Metadata wrong when using ForceNameAnnotation
body:
Metadata (`seq_mems.json` and the module hierarchy JSON) are not doing the right thing when a `ForceNameAnnotation` is applied to an instance. The following example shows this behavior for `seq_mems.json`:

```
circuit Foo: %[[
  {
    "class": "chisel3.util.experimental.ForceNameAnnotation",
    "target": "~Foo|Foo>bar",
    "name": "hello"
  }
]]
  module Bar:
    input clock: Clock
    input r: {en: UInt<1>, flip data: UInt<8>, addr: UInt<1>}[2]
    input w: {en: UInt<1>, data: UInt<8>, addr: UInt<1>, mask: UInt<1>}[2]

    mem m :
      data-type => UInt<8>
      depth => 32
      reader => r0
      reader => r1
      writer => w0
      writer => w1
      read-latency => 1
      write-latency => 1
      read-under-write => undefined

    m.r0.clk <= clock
    m.r0.en <= r[0].en
    m.r0.addr <= r[0].addr
    r[0].data <= m.r0.data

    m.r1.clk <= clock
    m.r1.en <= r[1].en
    m.r1.addr <= r[1].addr
    r[1].data <= m.r1.data

    m.w0.clk <= clock
    m.w0.en <= w[0].en
    m.w0.data <= w[0].data
    m.w0.addr <= w[0].addr
    m.w0.mask <= w[0].mask

    m.w1.clk <= clock
    m.w1.en <= w[1].en
    m.w1.data <= w[1].data
    m.w1.addr <= w[1].addr
    m.w1.mask <= w[1].mask

  module Foo:
    input clock: Clock
    input r: {en: UInt<1>, flip data: UInt<8>, addr: UInt<1>}[2]
    input w: {en: UInt<1>, data: UInt<8>, addr: UInt<1>, mask: UInt<1>}[2]

    inst bar of Bar
    bar.clock <= clock
    bar.r <= r
    bar.w <= w
```

This produces the following Verilog. Note the path `"Foo.bar.m.m_ext"` is wrong and should be `"Foo.hello.m.m_ext"`:

```verilog
// Generated by CIRCT unknown git version
module Bar(
  input        clock,
               r_0_en,
               r_0_addr,
               r_1_en,
               r_1_addr,
               w_0_en,
  input  [7:0] w_0_data,
  input        w_0_addr,
               w_0_mask,
               w_1_en,
  input  [7:0] w_1_data,
  input        w_1_addr,
               w_1_mask,
  output [7:0] r_0_data,
               r_1_data
);

  m m (
    .R0_addr ({4'h0, r_0_addr}),
    .R0_en   (r_0_en),
    .R0_clk  (clock),
    .R1_addr ({4'h0, r_1_addr}),
    .R1_en   (r_1_en),
    .R1_clk  (clock),
    .W0_addr ({4'h0, w_0_addr}),
    .W0_en   (w_0_mask & w_0_en),
    .W0_clk  (clock),
    .W0_data (w_0_data),
    .W1_addr ({4'h0, w_1_addr}),
    .W1_en   (w_1_mask & w_1_en),
    .W1_clk  (clock),
    .W1_data (w_1_data),
    .R0_data (r_0_data),
    .R1_data (r_1_data)
  );
endmodule

module Foo(
  input        clock,
               r_0_en,
               r_0_addr,
               r_1_en,
               r_1_addr,
               w_0_en,
  input  [7:0] w_0_data,
  input        w_0_addr,
               w_0_mask,
               w_1_en,
  input  [7:0] w_1_data,
  input        w_1_addr,
               w_1_mask,
  output [7:0] r_0_data,
               r_1_data
);

  Bar hello (
    .clock    (clock),
    .r_0_en   (r_0_en),
    .r_0_addr (r_0_addr),
    .r_1_en   (r_1_en),
    .r_1_addr (r_1_addr),
    .w_0_en   (w_0_en),
    .w_0_data (w_0_data),
    .w_0_addr (w_0_addr),
    .w_0_mask (w_0_mask),
    .w_1_en   (w_1_en),
    .w_1_data (w_1_data),
    .w_1_addr (w_1_addr),
    .w_1_mask (w_1_mask),
    .r_0_data (r_0_data),
    .r_1_data (r_1_data)
  );
endmodule

module m(
  input  [4:0] R0_addr,
  input        R0_en,
               R0_clk,
  input  [4:0] R1_addr,
  input        R1_en,
               R1_clk,
  input  [4:0] W0_addr,
  input        W0_en,
               W0_clk,
  input  [7:0] W0_data,
  input  [4:0] W1_addr,
  input        W1_en,
               W1_clk,
  input  [7:0] W1_data,
  output [7:0] R0_data,
               R1_data
);

  m_ext m_ext (
    .R0_addr (R0_addr),
    .R0_en   (R0_en),
    .R0_clk  (R0_clk),
    .R1_addr (R1_addr),
    .R1_en   (R1_en),
    .R1_clk  (R1_clk),
    .W0_addr (W0_addr),
    .W0_en   (W0_en),
    .W0_clk  (W0_clk),
    .W0_data (W0_data),
    .W1_addr (W1_addr),
    .W1_en   (W1_en),
    .W1_clk  (W1_clk),
    .W1_data (W1_data),
    .R0_data (R0_data),
    .R1_data (R1_data)
  );
endmodule

// external module m_ext


// ----- 8< ----- FILE "metadata/seq_mems.json" ----- 8< -----

[
  {
    "module_name": "m_ext",
    "depth": 32,
    "width": 8,
    "masked": false,
    "read": 2,
    "write": 2,
    "readwrite": 0,
    "extra_ports": [],
    "hierarchy": [
      "Foo.bar.m.m_ext"
    ]
  }
]

// ----- 8< ----- FILE "mems.conf" ----- 8< -----

name m_ext depth 32 width 8 ports write,write,read,read
```
